segment.source: A two-column lead-capture section: eyebrow, headline, rich-text description, a check-marked reassurance line, and an optional side image next to a card with a fixed embedded TYPO3 lead form. Use it for: 'book a demo' or 'talk to sales' sections, product walkthrough requests, trial and consultation sign-up passages. Prefer 'Booking Form' for appointment scheduling; use 'Contact Form Block' for general messages.
